meaning: n.adj.赝品,伪造品,伪造的,假冒的vt.伪造,假冒
examples: Are you aware these notes are counterfeit?
He admitted possessing and delivering counterfeit currency.
It is a crime to counterfeit money.
Another key role traders play these days is keeping counterfeit components from reaching end customers.
The products found at her premises were confirmed to be counterfeit by the relevant brand holders.
